items.name: osano_consentmanager_tattles
items.description: localStorage item used by Osano for script and cookie discovery processes. Session-based; not sent to the server with HTTP requests. Classified as Essential because the CMP relies on it for consent enforcement.

items.name: _vwo_{ACCOUNT_ID}_config
items.description: Stores VWO SmartCode configuration for the account. Contains settings such as enabled features, sampling rates, and campaign parameters.

items.name: _vwo_nlsCache
items.description: Caches VWO Natural Language Search (NLS) data locally to speed up subsequent script evaluations.

items.name: _vwo_nls_q_{ACCOUNT_ID}
items.description: Queues VWO Natural Language Search events for the account before they are flushed to VWO servers.

items.name: vwoSn
items.description: Stores the VWO session number for the current visitor. Used to track how many sessions a visitor has had, supporting session-based targeting and segmentation in VWO campaigns.

items.name: vwo_apm_sent
items.description: Set by VWO's monitoring library after performance data has been sampled and sent. Acts as a deduplication flag to prevent the monitoring payload from being transmitted more than once per browser context.

items.name: lastDomChange
items.description: Blocklisted until provider or purpose confirmed.

items.name: _grecaptcha
items.description: Set by Google reCAPTCHA to perform risk analysis and distinguish humans from automated bots. Stores configuration data required for reCAPTCHA's anti-abuse checks.

items.name: modernizr
items.persistence: Transient (set and removed during feature detection)
items.description: Temporary key set by Modernizr.js to test if localStorage is functional. Set, read back, and immediately removed. Should not persist.

items.name: browser-tabs-lock-key-auth0.lock.getTokenSilently
items.persistence: Transient (exists only while a token refresh lock is held)
items.description: Used by the Auth0 SPA SDK to synchronize silent token refresh requests across browser tabs. Prevents concurrent calls to the token endpoint.

items.name: i18nextLng
items.description: Stores the user's selected language preference for the i18next internationalization framework.
Blocklisted until provider or purpose confirmed.

items.name: yt-player-bandwidth
items.description: Stores estimated network bandwidth to optimize video stream quality in the YouTube embedded player.

items.name: yt-player-user-settings
items.description: Stores YouTube player preferences such as volume level, playback quality, and subtitle settings.

items.name: yt-remote-connected-devices
items.description: Stores a list of devices previously connected via YouTube's remote playback feature.

items.name: yt-remote-device-id
items.description: Stores a unique device identifier used by YouTube's remote playback feature to identify the current browser.

items.name: ytidb::LAST_RESULT_ENTRY_KEY
items.description: Used by YouTube's IndexedDB wrapper to track the last database operation result for integrity checks.

categories.name: Essential
categories.description: localStorage items required for the website or consent manager to function properly.

categories.name: Analytics
categories.description: localStorage items used by analytics and testing tools to store visitor data locally.

categories.name: Marketing
categories.description: localStorage items used for advertising, retargeting, or cross-site tracking.

categories.name: Personalized
categories.description: localStorage items that store user preferences and provide enhanced, tailored features.
